'''ât-j-b-sh''' ('''katajbeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:alkalize|alkalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-j-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:alkalize|alkalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-j-b-sh
|-
! Lemma
| katajbeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitajbeshoko|thitajbeshoko]] || [[word:jitajbeshoko|jitajbeshoko]] || [[word:shitajbeshoko|shitajbeshoko]] || [[word:kitajbeshoko|kitajbeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutajbeshoko|thuthutajbeshoko]] || [[word:jujutajbeshoko|jujutajbeshoko]] || [[word:shushutajbeshoko|shushutajbeshoko]] || [[word:kukutajbeshoko|kukutajbeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutajbeshoko|thutajbeshoko]] || [[word:jutajbeshoko|jutajbeshoko]] || [[word:shutajbeshoko|shutajbeshoko]] || [[word:kutajbeshoko|kutajbeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutajbeshoko|thutajbeshoko]] || [[word:jutajbeshoko|jutajbeshoko]] || [[word:shutajbeshoko|shutajbeshoko]] || [[word:kutajbeshoko|kutajbeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetajbeshoko|thetajbeshoko]] || [[word:jetajbeshoko|jetajbeshoko]] || [[word:shetajbeshoko|shetajbeshoko]] || [[word:ketajbeshoko|ketajbeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotajbeshoko|thothotajbeshoko]] || [[word:jojotajbeshoko|jojotajbeshoko]] || [[word:shoshotajbeshoko|shoshotajbeshoko]] || [[word:kokotajbeshoko|kokotajbeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotajbeshoko|thotajbeshoko]] || [[word:jotajbeshoko|jotajbeshoko]] || [[word:shotajbeshoko|shotajbeshoko]] || [[word:kotajbeshoko|kotajbeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotajbeshoko|thotajbeshoko]] || [[word:jotajbeshoko|jotajbeshoko]] || [[word:shotajbeshoko|shotajbeshoko]] || [[word:kotajbeshoko|kotajbeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtajbeshoko|thĂŠtajbeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtajbeshoko|jĂŠtajbeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtajbeshoko|shĂŠtajbeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtajbeshoko|kĂŠtajbeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatajbeshoko|thathatajbeshoko]] || [[word:jajatajbeshoko|jajatajbeshoko]] || [[word:shashatajbeshoko|shashatajbeshoko]] || [[word:kakatajbeshoko|kakatajbeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatajbeshoko|thatajbeshoko]] || [[word:jatajbeshoko|jatajbeshoko]] || [[word:shatajbeshoko|shatajbeshoko]] || [[word:katajbeshoko|katajbeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatajbeshoko|thatajbeshoko]] || [[word:jatajbeshoko|jatajbeshoko]] || [[word:shatajbeshoko|shatajbeshoko]] || [[word:katajbeshoko|katajbeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shatajbeshithi|shatajbeshithi]] || [[word:shatajbeshiji|shatajbeshiji]] || [[word:shatajbeshishi|shatajbeshishi]] || [[word:shatajbeshiki|shatajbeshiki]]
